title: AverageSettings
description: Settings for the Average sync task.

axis.description:
Axis along which to compute the mean. Must satisfy:
- axis in [0, 2]

start.description:
Inclusive index where the average begins. Must satisfy:
- start >= 0
- start < end

end.description:
Exclusive index where the average stops. Must satisfy:
- end > start
- end <= size along axis
